description: Anchor-distance embedding classifier. Merges Gemini and Qwen neutral files by id, embeds query/response/Gemini/Qwen once each, then trains a logistic regression over six response-level cosine-distance features: query-Gemini, query-Qwen, Gemini-Qwen, query-response, Gemini-response, and Qwen-response. The first three should stay small for clean paraphrases; injected ads should push the response farther away from that neutral cluster.
